name: desktop
description: Pocket Cash — offline-first personal finance, on your desktop.

scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n web,electron -c blue,magenta "cross-env DATABASE_DRIVER=embedded PGLITE_DATA_DIR=.pglite PGLITE_MIGRATIONS_DIR=../../packages/database/drizzle/migrations pnpm --filter web dev" "pnpm dev:electron"
scripts.dev:electron: node esbuild.mjs && wait-on tcp:127.0.0.1:3000 && cross-env NODE_ENV=development electron dist/main.cjs
scripts.build: pnpm --filter web build && node scripts/flatten-standalone.mjs && node scripts/prepare-icon.mjs && pnpm build:main && electron-builder
